mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_room (college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{collegeId}, #{name}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{teacher}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time FROM class_room
SELECT id, college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time FROM class_room WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time FROM class_room WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time FROM class_room WHERE grade = #{grade}
SELECT id, college_id, name, grade, major, teacher, create_time, update_time FROM class_room WHERE major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classRoomId}

SELECT cr.id AS classId, cr.name AS className, cr.grade, cr.major, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS studentCount, ROUND(AVG(sc.score), 2) AS avgScore, MAX(sc.score) AS maxScore, MIN(sc.score) AS minScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sc.id), 2) AS passRate FROM class_room cr LEFT JOIN student s ON s.class_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN score sc ON sc.student_id = s.id WHERE cr.id = #{classRoomId} GROUP BY cr.id, cr.name, cr.grade, cr.major
